1884810.name: Where The Heart Leads Demo
1884810.description:
Play the first 45 minutes of Where the Heart Leads, a surreal narrative adventure about family where choices made directly affect the outcome of your life.

Given the chance to do it all over again, what would you change? Who would you become? And who will stand by you at your end?

A Lifetime Of Choices

Grapple with life’s difficult decisions across decades of adventure and affect the lives of memorable, complex characters.



This demo covers the introduction and first year of the game, establishing the characters and situations that set up the next stage of your life.
If you like what you play, wishlist or buy the full game. Purchasing includes a digital artbook, a downloadable soundtrack with over 3 hours of music, and an art depot with assets you can use for your games!
